name: Remote Transmitter → Transmit Samsung
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) sends a Samsung infrared remote code to a remote transmitter. It transmits codes up to 64 bits in length in a single packet.

config_entries.label: Data
config_entries.description: The data to send, see dumper output for more details.

config_entries.label: Nbits
config_entries.description: The number of bits to send. Defaults to `32`.
